basic_details.job_title: CSL Supervisor Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Posts
basic_details.short_information: Cochin Shipyard Limited (CSL) Supervisor Trainee Notification 2026 has been released on 30-04-2026 on the official website of Cochin Shipyard Limited. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CSL Supervisor Trainee Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 27 years as on 30-04-2026. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Three-year Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or Electrical Engineering
qualification.details: Supervisor Trainee (Mechanical): Three-year Diploma in Mechanical Engineering recognized by State Board of Technical Education. Supervisor Trainee (Electrical): Three-year Diploma in Electrical Engineering recognized by State Board of Technical Education.

salary_details.details: During 1 year of training, a consolidated stipend of ₹ 30,000/- per month will be provided. After successful completion of training, the salary will be in the range of ₹ 28,000-1,10,000 (PS-1 Grade) per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSL Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSL Supervisor Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the CSL Supervisor Trainee posts is 15-05-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Supervisor Trainee posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a three-year Diploma in Mechanical Engineering or Electrical Engineering, recognized by the State Board of Technical Education, to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Supervisor Trainee position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Supervisor Trainee posts is 27 years, as of 30-04-2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the application fee for General and OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: For General and OBC category candidates, the application fee is ₹ 300/- plus applicable bank charges. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for CSL Supervisor Trainee recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Supervisor Trainee posts will primarily involve an Objective Type Written Test. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in this test.

faq.question: Q6. What is the starting salary for a Supervisor Trainee after training?
faq.answer: After successful completion of the one-year training period, the salary for a Supervisor Trainee will be in the range of ₹ 28,000 to ₹ 1,10,000 per month (PS-1 Grade).

faq.question: Q7. How long is the training period for Supervisor Trainees?
faq.answer: The training period for Supervisor Trainees at Cochin Shipyard is one year. During this period, trainees will receive a consolidated stipend.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Andaman and Nicobar Islands apply?
faq.answer: The job location is mentioned as Sri Vijaya Puram, Andaman and Nicobar Islands. While the notification doesn't explicitly restrict applications based on domicile, candidates should check the detailed notification for any specific residency requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any relaxation in age for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be applicable for candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the prevailing government rules and regulations. Specific details can be found in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
